# hybrid

**Type Property**

A hybrid option that changes the format according to the size of the number.

## Declaration

```swift
static var hybrid: OSLogFloatFormatting { get }
```

## Discussion

This option is equivalent to the `%g` option in `fprintf`. It behaves like the [doc://com.apple.os/documentation/os/OSLogFloatFormatting/fixed] option when the number is close to `1.0`, and like the [doc://com.apple.os/documentation/os/OSLogFloatFormatting/exponential] option when the number has a large exponent.

## Getting the Standard Formats

- **fixed**: The standard fixed-point format option.
- **hex**: The standard hexadecimal format for floating-point values.
- **exponential**: The standard exponential format option.

items.description: The standard hexadecimal format for floating-point values.
